channel.title: Gui on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Gui on Arrans github.io

item.title: fyne-io/fyne
item.description: Cross platform GUI toolkit in Go inspired by Material Design

item.title: HeyPuter/puter
item.description: 🌐 The Internet OS! Free, Open-Source, and Self-Hostable.

item.title: ocornut/imgui
item.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies

item.title: sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
item.description: Windows/macOS/Linux GUI client for GIT users

item.title: sveinbjornt/Sloth
item.description: Mac app that shows all open files, directories, sockets, pipes and devices in use by all running processes. Nice GUI for lsof.

item.title: moderato-app/approf
item.description: A native macOS app for pprof

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is a declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, or JavaScript apps.

item.title: AllenDang/giu
item.description: Cross platform rapid GUI framework for golang based on Dear ImGui.

item.title: aarzilli/nucular
item.description: GUI toolkit for go

item.title: arwes/arwes
item.description: Futuristic Sci-Fi UI Web Framework.

item.title: lvgl/lvgl
item.description: Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

item.title: roblillack/spot
item.description: React-like desktop GUI toolkit for Go

item.title: cogentcore/core
item.description: A free and open source framework for building powerful, fast, elegant 2D and 3D apps that run on macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and the web with a single Go codebase, allowing you to Code Once, Run Everywhere.

item.title: eneshecan/whatsapp-for-linux
item.description: An unofficial WhatsApp desktop application for Linux.

item.title: vugu/vugu
item.description: Vugu: A modern UI library for Go+WebAssembly (experimental)

item.title: FyshOS/fynedesk
item.description: A full desktop environment for Linux/Unix using Fyne

item.title: ying32/govcl
item.description: Cross-platform Go/Golang GUI library.

item.title: gui-cs/Terminal.Gui
item.description: Cross Platform Terminal UI toolkit for .NET

item.title: easydiffusion/easydiffusion
item.description: Easiest 1-click way to create beautiful artwork on your PC using AI, with no tech knowledge. Provides a browser UI for generating images from text prompts and images. Just enter your text prompt, and see the generated image.

item.title: Jacalz/rymdport
item.description: Cross-platform application for easy encrypted file, folder, and text sharing between devices.

item.title: rodrigocfd/windigo
item.description: Windows API and GUI in idiomatic Go.
